titleStmt.title: SII 20.144: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 144. (B.K. No. 52 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1088, Vyaya, Kārtika, Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse. The date is irregular. In the year cited, the tithi corresponded to A.D. 1166, November 9, which was Wednesday. There was no eclipse on that day.
The inscription opens with a brief genealogy and eulogistic account of the conquests of Bijjala. Then follows the genealogy of the king's general Srīdhara, who was governing Huligere-300.

The purpose of the epigraph is to record the forming of a brahmapuri in the capital town (rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa) of Huligere by Śrīdhara-daṇḍanāyaka and his brother Mācharasa-daṇḍanāyaka. The brahmapuri was donated to fifty-two persons among whom were a number of brāhmaṇas versed in different branches of learning. The boundaries of the brahmapuri are specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrātabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrī
śrīmaddakṣiṇasōmanāthanagajāpīnastanāliṁganaprēmaṁ caṁdrakaḷādharaṁ purikarapra
khyātacaṁcatpurīdhāmaṁ sundaralakṣaṇākṛtinutaśrīśaṁbhunaṁmrāmarastōmaṁ śrīdhara daṇḍanāthatiḷakaṁgīgendumānanda[vaṁ .]
© janatāsaṁstutanappa jōgamanṛpaṁ tatsūnu dhātrīśamaṁḍananatyūrjjitatējanuddhura baḷaṁ permmāḍibhūpāḷanātana putraṁ ripurāyadarppada
ḷanaṁ vairībhakaṇṭhīravaṁ vanadhivyāvṛtabhūribhūvaḷayanāthaṁ bijjalōrvvīśvaraṁ . © © śrīmatkaḷacuriya kuḷōddāmaṁ negardaṁ dharitriyoḷ
jayalakṣmīdhāmaṁ pāḷitavibudhastōmaṁ bijjaḷanahitakarāḷa . dhareyaṁ pīḍisi sokki dakkudalevāydudvṛttarādanyabhūparanunmūḷisi tanna
bāhubaladiṁ viśvaṁbharābhāravaṁ piriduṁ tāḷdida peṁpinoṁdesakadiṁ mikkanyabhūpāḷa roḷ doreyē bāṣpaviśīryyavairivanitādṛkkajjalaṁ bijjalaṁ . paranṛpa
raṁji tetta dhanamuṁ vanitājanamuṁ vibhūṣaṇāṁbaragajavājisaṁkuḷamumallade mikka nṛpāḷaraṁtirajjara paḍeditta rājyavibhavakkanurāgade muyvanāṁpane
sphuritatarapratāpa bāppure bijjalabhūmipāḷakaṁ . muḷidi mēruviṁ vārddhiyene posedadoṁdoṁde hastyādi ratnaṁgaḷanādaṁ pettanī bi
jjalananupamabhūpē nātmāsidēvācaḷadiṁ dviṭsainyavāridhiyene poseda saṁkhyāta hastyādiratnaṁgaḷanādaṁ pettaneṁdaṁdadhikane valamā dēva
rājaṁgamīgaḷ . dhareyoḷ vikramacakravarttiyenisirddā bijjalōrbbīśabhīkarabhērīrava mommodal negaḷe gēḷdā gūrjjaraṁ koḍe jarjjaranā
daṁ kusidaṁ khasaṁ naḍugi kaṁḍaṁ pāṁḍyanaṁdaṁji barbbaranurbbaṁ bisuṭāḍidaṁ bhayade pokkaṁ māḷavaṁ māḷavaṁ . Udayōttuṁgādrisētukṣitidharamaparō
rbbīdharaṁ mattavā haimadarībhṛtteyde taṁnāḷvavaniya caturāghāṭasaṁśuddhigēri kkida guṁḍaṁ pōle viśvaṁbhareya bharavanāṁtirddapaṁ pettaluṁ poṇmidudeṁdadaṇṇasā
mānyane nṛpatiḷakaṁ bijjalakṣōṇipāḷaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā rājādhirājaṁ . kāḷāṁjanapuravarādhīśvaraṁ . suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍa
marugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ . kaḷacuriyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ . kadanapracaṁḍaṁ . mānakanakācaḷaṁ . subhaṭarādityaṁ . kaligaḷaṁkuśaṁ . gajasāmaṁta śaraṇā
gatavajrapaṁjaraṁ . pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ . paranārīsahōdaraṁ . sanivārasiddhi . giri durggamallaṁ . caladaṁkarāmaṁ . vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ . nissaṁkamalla . nāmā
di prasastisahitaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamallavīrabijjaladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ sa
luttamire . Ā rājaśikhāmaṇipadanīrajabhṛṁgaṁ vinūtavijayōttuṁgaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷne gaḷdiṟdaṁ dhīraṁ śrīdharacamūpanaṁgajarūpaṁ .
Ā daṁḍanāthacūḍāmaṇiya vaṁśāvatārameṁtaṁdaḍe . kamaḷabhavānvayadoḷaguttamana khiḷajagadvinūtanesediṟdanagastyamunīṁdraṁ
suranutananupamanupamitamahāmahimanakhiḷamunijanasēvyaṁ . Ene negaḷdagastyagōtra doḷaganupamitaṁ dāsirājadaṁḍādhīśaṁ
janatāsaṁstutyaṁ khyātanādanāś®tasamājadivijamahījaṁ . Ātana kulavadhu guṇa gaṇanūtanamaṇivibhūṣaṇāvaḷaṁbini bhuvana
khyāte patibrateyādaḷ bhūtaḷadoḷ duggaṇavveyeṁbaḷ pesariṁ . Avarge sutaṁ puṭṭidanutsavadiṁdaṁ hariyaṇayyadaṁḍādhīśaṁ
bhuvanajanastutanāś®ta nivahamanōrathaphaḷapradāmarabhūjaṁ . jagadoḷ śrīśaraṇaikāgra gaṇyananupamitapuṇyaneThe letterta is written above the line.
sediṟdaṁ cāruguṇābhirāmanaṁbhōdhigabhīraṁ hariyaṇayyadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . janakaṁ tāṁ dāsirājaṁ janani patihitācāre duggabbe
mattaṁtenasuṁ śrīpaṁpanuṁ rudranumamaḷayaśarttaṁna taṁmaṁdireṁduṁ tanagāḷvaṁ bijjalōrbbīśvaranamaravaraṁ śaṁkaraṁ deyvameṁdaṁ
du nitāṁtaṁ vipracūḍāmaṇi hariyaṇaniṁ dhanyaneṁbaṁnanāvaṁ . Ātana kulavadhu bhūdharajātege sītege payōdhijātege paṁ
kējātāsyajātegeṇeyene bhūtaḷadoḷ mudikavve pesarvaḍediṟdaḷ . Aṁtā daṁpati gaḷge puṭṭidariḷākhyātaṁ yaśaśrīva
dhūkāṁtaṁ mācaṇadaṁḍanāthatiḷakaṁ śrī śrīdharaṁ sōmaneṁbiṁtī mūvaruvapratarkkya mahimarssaujanyarudyadguṇā
krāṁtarbbijjalabhūmipāḷapṛtanādhīśarmmahāmaṁtrigaḷ . Ā mācirājadaṁḍanātha cūḍāmaṇiya mahimeyaṁ
pēḷvaḍe . kṣitiyoḷ vikhyātanādaṁ sakaḷaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtaṁ bijjalōrbbīpatipādāṁbhō jabhriṁgaṁ kumudadhavaḷacaṁcadyaśōvallarīvē
llitadigjāḷaṁ surēṁdrāvanīdharanibhadhairyyaṁ bṛhatyāgasaṁtarppitadīnānāthayūthaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ mācadaṁḍādhi
nāthaṁ . Ī caturudadhiparītadharācakraṁ padepiniṁde baṁṇṇise negardaṁ māci bali gutta ja dadhīcigaḷiṁdadhikavenipa vitaraṇaguṇadiṁ .
Adalladeyuṁ . sōmana mahimeyanusirvvaḍe sāmānyamadaltu gaganataḷadaṁdade nissī mamenalīgaḷitaracamūmātrarssariye
bagedu bhāvisi nōḍal . Avariṁdavadhikanādaṁ bhuvanajanastutyanamaḷacārucaritraṁ kavijana manōrathapradadivijakujaṁ śrī
dharacamūpatitiḷakaṁ . caritaṁ gāṁgēyanoḷ pāsaṭi caturate vākkāminīnāthanoḷ tāṁ sari gāṁbhīryyaṁ payōrāśiyoḷeṇe
nijaviśrāṁtaviṁdrāriyoḷ pōdore taṁnnoṁdārppu vidyādharapatiyoḷaṇaṁ pāṭi yeṁdeṁdu viśvaṁbhareyellaṁ baṇnikuṁ śrīdha
ranananudinaṁ nirbbharānaṁdadiṁdaṁ . kaḷikamaḷakaḷaṁkapaṁkamanaleṁdu ta(ṁ)nnoṁdu cārucaritasudhānirmmaḷajaḷadiṁdamenal bhūtaḷadoḷ śrīdharana sa
rige varppavanāvaṁ . Avarivaruvaroḷḷidareṁba vivādavadēke sakaḷaguṇagaṇadiṁ bhuvanatraya doḷagoḷḷidanivanorbbaṁ śrīdharaṁ camū
patitiḷakaṁ . vacana . Aṁtenisi negardda śrīdharadaṇḍanāyakaṁ huligeṟemūnūṟuvaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdarasuge
yyuttiṟdoṁdu devasaṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷ śrīmattribhuvanaikavīrabijjaladēvargge dharmmakathāprasaṁgamādalli mācarasadaṇḍanāyaka
nuṁ śrīdharadaṇḍanāyakanumoṁdāgiṟdu dēvara rājyābhyudayanimittaṁ śrīmadrājadhāni paṭṭaṇaṁ huligeṟeyalli brahma
puriyaṁ māḍidappeveṁdu binnavisi tadanujñeyiṁ pāramēśvaradattiyāgi brahmapuriyaṁ biṭṭaraṁtā bahmapuriya parivaḍiyeṁteṁdaḍe .
bahukaḷābrahma vāsudēvabhaṭṭaru . mahāvādi caṁgadēvabhaṭṭaru sarasvatisōmayāji bhaṭṭaru . Ātmavittugaḷappa Appaṇabhaṭṭaru . śrī
raṇadvēdibhaṭṭaru tārkkika dēvaṇabhaṭṭaru . vācaspati mahādēvabhaṭṭaru . Ubhaya vaiyā karaṇi mādhavabhaṭṭaru pāṇinīyara kēśavabhaṭṭa
ru . maṁcibhaṭṭaru guṁḍadēvabhaṭṭaru . mallibhaṭṭaru . Anantabhaṭṭaru . paṭṭavarddhana sāviya ṇa ghaḷisāsaru . paṭṭavarddhana trivikrama ghaḷi
sāsaru . Amānisa paṭṭavarddhana nāgaviṣṇu ghaḷisāsaru . māhēśvarāditya ghaḷisāsaru . paṭṭavarddhana caṁdraghaḷisāsaru . daśagraṁthi mu
ddaṇa ghaḷisāsaru . daśagraṁthi Īśvara ghaḷisāsaru . kramitalakṣmīdhara ghaḷisāsaru . sōmē śvara ghaḷisāsaru . paṭṭavarddhana basavaṇa ghaḷisā
saru lakṣmīdhara ghaḷisāsaru . kayvadada sōmēśvara ghaḷisāsaru . gaṇapati ghaḷisāsaru . brahma dēva ghaḷisāsaru . nārāyaṇa ghaḷisāsa
ru . khaṁḍikada śaṁkara ghaḷisāsaru . khaṁḍikada dēmeya ghaḷisāsaru . janamanōharaṁ rāma dēvōpādhyāyaru . mādhyaṁdina śākheya nāraṇō
pādhyāyaru jyōtisa padmanābhabhaṭṭaru . śaṁkaranāyakaru Āvara maga bammarasa . maiduna kēśavadēva . caṁdrabhaṭṭaru . nārasiṁhabhaṭṭaru . sahajakavi
nāgadēvapaṇḍitaru . gauḍa sāvikāvarasaru . haḍapadaicarasaru . Agastyēśvarada dāsi yaṁṇanu . gaṇikēśvarada dāśiyaṁṇanu . śōbhanēśvarada mārttaṇḍa
yyanu śaṁkarakramitaru . pūjāri sōmaṇnanu . Ā kēśirājanu . Ā nāṇimayyanuṁ . Ā saṁkayyanu . Ā maga mahadēvanu . saṁhiteya rēva
rasanu . gaṇakikara brahmadēvabhaṭṭaru . sūtradhāri rēvōjanu . mūṟu taḷāṟavritti Iṁtī yayvattirbbarge bahmapuriya vrittiyaṁ
kuḍalvēḍi pārvvagēriya nūṟirppadirbbarggaṁ dravyanivēdanaṁ māḍi Ājjavara maduvaṇana bhūmiyoḷage purakke vēḍi mattaruvaṟunūṟu tamma bhūmi
yaṁ dhāreyaṁ koṁḍu hiriya ṟoṭṭayavuṁḍa ṟoṭṭaya sāmaṁta paḍavaḷaicaṇa Āḍapada rāyaṁṇa taṁtrapāla kēsiyaṇaniṁtivaroḷagāgi sāsira pari
graha sahitamiṁdrakēsidēvarasargge dravyanivēdanaṁ māḍi maṁnneya voladoḷage nūṟa toṁbhattu mattaru bhūmiyaṁ dhāreyaṁ koṁḍu hulegeṟe munnūThe letter ṟe is written below the line.
ṟoḷagaṇa beṁṇnedhaḍiyeḷpattaṟa baḷiya bāḍa kaṟaḷavāḍa sahitaṁ sakanṛpavarṣa 1088 neya Avyaya saṁvatsarada kārttikada paurṇnamāsye sōmavāra
vyatīpāta sōmagrahaṇadalli śrī sōmanāthadēvara saṁnnidhānadal śrīdharadaṁḍa nāyakanayvattirbbarggaṁ pādaprakṣāḷanapūrbbakaṁ sarvva
bādhāparihāraṁ sarbbanamasyavāgi koṭṭanā purada sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe mūḍal kājava goṁḍada keyya paḍuvaṇa mēreyal naṭṭa kallu teṁkal hōbēśvarada bhūmiya
mēreyal naṭṭa kallu paḍuval goggiyapurada mūḍaṇa bhūmiya mēreya naṭṭa kallu baḍagal keṟeyēriya baḍagageṟe gadeya naṭṭa kallu sthaḷavṛttiya
holada sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe mūḍa lakkiguṁdada baṭṭeya paḍuvaṇa paḷḷadoḷagaṇemmeguṁḍina teṁka meyyal naṭṭa kallu . Āgnēyadalli Eraḍuṁ paḷḷada kūḍal teṁka
lu kiṁnarigallu nairityadal kuṟuṁbagoḷadēriyiṁ mūḍal naṭṭa kallu . Alliṁ baḍagamogade naḍeyalu sōmanāthadēvara keyya teṁkaṇa mēreyal na
ṭṭa kallu Alliṁ mūḍa naḍeyalā keyyāgnēyadalu naṭṭa kallu . Alliṁ baḍaga naḍeyalā keyya Īśānyadal naṭṭa kallu Alliṁ paḍuva naḍeyalā ke
yya baḍagaṇa mēreyal naṭṭa kallu Alliṁ baḍagamogade naḍeyaloḷakeya haḷḷa vāyavyada mēre . baḍagalā haḷḷave mēre . Īśānyadalā haḷḷavaḷiyal
naṭṭa kallu . Ī bhūmiya teṁkaṇa kaḍeyiṁnnēsaṟalu dasavaṁdakke mattar hattoṁbhattu © © Intī brahmapuriya dharmmamaṁ mēlāḷkeyarasu
gaḷuṁ . nakaraṁgaḷuṁ . mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ . paṁcamaṭhasthānaṁgaḷuṁ . maṁnneyaruṁ sadharmmadiṁdaṁ kūḍi pratipāḷisuvar . Ī dharmmakkārō
rvvaranyāyamaṁ ciṁtisidavargge kurukṣētra prayāge vāraṇāsiyeṁba tīrtthasthānaṁga ḷoḷ sahasravēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇaraṁ koṁdaṁtappa pāpamakku .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundhārāṁ sa viṣṭhāyāṁ kṛmirbhbhūtvā pitṛ bhissaha majjati . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasyaThe verse is left incomplete.
hāruvara neladoḷage goggiyapurada holagērige māṟakoṁḍu biṭṭa kamma 200 brahma puriya holagērige biṭṭa kamma 50This line
Digital edition of SII 20.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
